name: alwaysmap
description: Practical AI plugins for job searching and learning. Built by Dylan Thomas.

plugins.name: jfm
plugins.description: An AI-powered job search agent that learns what roles you'd actually take, finds them, assesses fit, and prepares you for interviews.

plugins.name: tmb
plugins.description: A learning curriculum builder that interviews you about your goal, designs a structured hands-on curriculum, and builds a folder with exercises, validation, and an optional Hugo site.
